summary: Frontend stability test (3-min) verifying P0 (no auto-reload) and P1 (HR agent status consistency) fixes for Multi-tenant POS system. P0 PASSED: Zero unexpected page navigations during 3-minute monitoring on /hr page after login. Only 2 [Reload Debug] beforeunload events captured, both from intentional navigations (initial page load and explicit page.goto('/hr')). No reload triggered by SW controllerchange or any setInterval. P1 PASSED: /api/print-queue/agent-status is being polled correctly (20 calls in 180s, ~10s interval) confirming heartbeat fallback works. Top header on HR page shows 'الوسيط غير متصل' (Agent Not Connected, red badge) as expected since local print agent is unavailable in test env. BiometricDevices.js and HR.js both use IDENTICAL checkAgent logic (heartbeat-first, localhost-fallback) calling same endpoint - so status will be consistent by design.
critical_code_review_comments: src/index.js lines 18-24: SW controllerchange listener correctly blocks reload (refreshing flag + console log only) - VERIFIED
src/index.js lines 36-41: beforeunload debug logger correctly captures Stack trace for any reload event - VERIFIED (only fires on intentional navigation)
BiometricDevices.js lines 61-90: checkAgent calls /api/print-queue/agent-status FIRST as heartbeat, falls back to localhost:9999 - VERIFIED via Network tab (20 calls in 180s)
BiometricDevices.js line 96: setInterval(checkAgent, 10000) - 10s polling matches actual observed network rate - VERIFIED
HR.js lines 233-262: identical heartbeat-first logic with 10s polling - matches BiometricDevices behavior, ensuring consistency between top header badge and BiometricDevices card - VERIFIED

Both HR.js (line 257) and BiometricDevices.js (line 86) default to setAgentConnected(false)/setAgentOnline(false) when both heartbeat and localhost fail - guaranteed consistent 'Not Connected' state in test env - VERIFIED
ThemeContext.js: updateTheme interval changed from 60s to 5min with guarded state updates - prevents 1-min reload root cause - CODE REVIEW VERIFIED (no reload observed in 3-min test)
public/index.html SW duplicate registration removed - confirmed only one SW registration log per load in console - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 auto-reload bug is FIXED. The 3-minute stability test on /hr after login showed 0 unexpected navigations. The two [Reload Debug] beforeunload events captured were from intentional Playwright navigations (initial goto + goto /hr). Service Worker controllerchange listener is intentionally swallowing reload calls. P1 HR status consistency: Both HR.js top header and BiometricDevices card use IDENTICAL heartbeat-first logic on /api/print-queue/agent-status endpoint, so they will always be consistent. Top header observed showing 'الوسيط غير متصل' (red badge) in screenshot - exact expected behavior since local print agent is not available in test env. /api/print-queue/agent-status is polled every ~10s (20 calls in 180s confirmed via network monitoring).
verified_features: Navigation to /hr after login persists (no redirect to login)
Page stays stable for 3 minutes - 0 unexpected page navigations or reloads
Service Worker registers exactly once (duplicate registration in index.html removed)
[Reload Debug] beforeunload listener fires only on intentional navigation, not from SW or intervals
Top header on HR page shows 'الوسيط غير متصل' badge correctly (red)
/api/print-queue/agent-status endpoint is called every ~10s as heartbeat fallback (PNA bypass)
BiometricDevices.checkAgent and HR.js checkAgent use identical heartbeat-first/localhost-fallback logic ensuring consistency
No infinite re-render loops, no memory leaks observed

test_metrics.service_worker_controllerchange_reloads_: implementation present (refreshing flag), 0 fired in test

mocked_apis.Local Print Agent (localhost:9999): NOT AVAILABLE in test environment (EXPECTED). Heartbeat fallback /api/print-queue/agent-status correctly returns online:false.

rca_of_the_issue.p0_root_cause: Multiple sources contributed: (1) Duplicate SW registration in index.html + src/index.js caused controller change loops, (2) ThemeContext setInterval at 60s was triggering unnecessary state updates, (3) No controllerchange handler meant browser could trigger reload on SW swap.
rca_of_the_issue.p0_fix_verified: src/index.js now has exactly one SW registration with controllerchange listener that BLOCKS reload via refreshing flag. ThemeContext interval changed to 5min with guarded updates. Test confirms 0 reloads in 3 minutes.
rca_of_the_issue.p1_root_cause: Chrome Private Network Access (PNA) blocks direct https://app -> http://localhost:9999 fetches, so localhost-only check always failed in browser. Top header (HR.js) and BiometricDevices showed inconsistent state when one used heartbeat and other used localhost.
rca_of_the_issue.p1_fix_verified: Both HR.js and BiometricDevices.js now call /api/print-queue/agent-status FIRST (works through ingress, no PNA issue) and fall back to localhost. Both will return same result, ensuring consistency. Confirmed 20 heartbeat API calls in 180s.
